query: SELECT e.id, e.nombre, e.proyectoId, COUNT(i.id) as item_count FROM empresas e LEFT JOIN items i ON i.empresaId = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.nombre, e.proyectoId HAVING item_count > 0 ORDER BY item_count DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT e.id, e.nombre, e.proyectoId, COUNT(i.id) as item_count FROM empresas e LEFT JOIN items i ON i.empresaId = e.id GROUP BY e.id, e.nombre, e.proyectoId HAVING item_count > 0 ORDER BY item_count DESC
